seoTitle: Morley vs Mornington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Morley and Mornington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Morley and Mornington.
heading: Morley vs Mornington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Morley, Western Australia and Mornington, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mornington has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Morley (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Morley or Mornington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Morley has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Mornington scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Morley scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Mornington scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Morley or Mornington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mornington has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
